Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where PRE_APPROVER is involved after ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Payment Handled in variants that include a rejection by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER when the process diverges to PRE_APPROVER instead of ADMINISTRATION approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'
